name: 05-05-chat-composer-usability
title: Chat workbench composer usability
description: Remove excessive blank space above the tavern chat composer and make message input faster by folding secondary identity controls.
creator: lijin
notes: Fixed the chat workbench blank gap by removing fixed/flex filler height, bounding the chat log, folding visitor identity controls, and collapsing right-rail details by default. Verified with script tests, full frontend tests, typecheck, build, and Playwright desktop/mobile screenshots.
